text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Cafe. I just happen to<n>have finished
developing a drink that<n>will increase your muscle
mass<n>significantly...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yes, those are my thoughts as well. I willnot allow you to drink this... no matterhow hard you beg.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Okay? Then if you don't need anything,<n>do you
mind leaving?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Well, there goes that plan. I had<n>heard
some people are susceptible to<n>the Caligula
Effect, or a desire to do<n>that which is forbidden...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But from your lack of interest, I see that<n>is not the
case for you. How unfortunate.<n>I shall have to
look elsewhere for a<n>volunteer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well? Are you going or not? Whatever<n>you're
trying to do, it won't work.
